personal.name: Clifford Atsika
personal.title: Full-Stack Software Engineer
personal.tagline: Building Production-Ready Software That Solves Real Problems

hero.lede: A Full-Stack Software Engineer and SaaS Founder with a passion for transforming complex problems into elegant, production-ready software. Creator of Keymint.dev, with a focus on modern web applications, secure systems, and developer tools.

about.title: About
about.intro: I'm a Full-Stack Software Engineer and SaaS Founder with a passion for building production-ready solutions that solve real problems.
paragraphs: With over five years of experience, I've successfully designed, built, and launched Keymint.dev—a secure, scalable software licensing service for developers. My work has empowered developers to easily manage licensing and activations through a developer-friendly API and intuitive dashboard.

As a freelance developer, I've delivered over 15 custom full-stack web applications and automation tools to a global clientele. I specialize in building robust backend systems, secure payment integrations, and high-performance frontend interfaces, always with a focus on clean code, scalability, and user experience.
about.quote: Building software isn't just about writing code—it's about understanding problems deeply and crafting solutions that stand the test of time.

skills.title: Frontend Development
skills.description: Building responsive, high-performance user interfaces with React.js, TypeScript, and modern CSS frameworks. Focused on creating exceptional user experiences.

skills.title: Backend Development
skills.description: Designing and building robust, scalable APIs and backend systems with Node.js and Python. Experienced with both SQL and NoSQL databases (PostgreSQL, Firebase).

skills.title: Security & Cryptography
skills.description: Implementing secure authentication and licensing solutions using cryptographic signatures and public key verification.

skills.title: SaaS Development
skills.description: Leading end-to-end SaaS development, from product ideation and architecture to Stripe integration and analytics.

skills.title: Desktop Applications
skills.description: Creating cross-platform desktop applications with PyQt that have improved client productivity by up to 30%.

skills.title: SEO & Analytics
skills.description: Improving web visibility and search performance through technical SEO, structured data, and analytics.

projects.title: Selected Work
projects.description: A collection of software products and tools I've built, from concept to production.

items.title: Keymint.dev
items.subtitle: Software License Management System
items.description: A secure, scalable software licensing service for developers, featuring a REST API, a vendor dashboard, and support for multiple licensing models. Keymint provides actionable insights and empowers developers to manage their software with ease.

items.title: GitHub Email Scraper
items.subtitle: Open Source CLI Tool
items.description: An open-source Python CLI for ethically scraping public contributor emails from GitHub repositories, reducing manual data collection time by over 80%.

contact.title: Let's Connect
contact.intro: I'm always open to discussing new projects, collaboration opportunities, or simply connecting with fellow developers and entrepreneurs. Whether you have a product idea, need technical consulting, or want to explore working together, I'd love to hear from you.

resume.objective: Full-Stack Software Engineer with 5+ years building scalable SaaS platforms, secure cryptographic systems, and automation solutions. Eager to contribute technical expertise in a collaborative setting.

experience.title: Freelance Full-Stack Developer
achievements: Delivered 15+ custom web applications and automation tools to clients in over 5 countries.
Improved client productivity by up to 30% by developing 5+ custom PyQt desktop applications.
Engineered and integrated secure Stripe billing systems for 8+ platforms.
Successfully managed over 20 projects across global time zones, maintaining 100% client satisfaction.
Boosted client organic traffic by an average of 40% through targeted SEO optimizations.

experience.title: Founder & Software Engineer
achievements: Architected a robust licensing backend with a REST API, enabling developers to integrate secure licensing into their applications in minutes.
Developed a vendor dashboard with real-time analytics, providing valuable insights into license activation and usage patterns.
Implemented multiple licensing models (perpetual, subscription, trial) to provide flexible options for software developers.
Designed a self-service customer portal, reducing support overhead and empowering end-users to manage their own licenses.
Ensured high security and reliability, building trust with a growing base of developers.

education.degree: Bachelor of Science in Computer Science

achievements: Published open-source GitHub Email Scraper used by 200+ developers
Reduced data collection time by 80% for research teams
